response.reasoning: Candidate has 6+ years (actually 15+) as a full-stack engineer with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS experience matching the primary stack. Current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, directly aligning with the AI agent development requirement. Strong background in TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship from RIDE Capital. Has Java experience (secondary stack requirement). No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Python in the resume, though general testing and multi-language proficiency is evident. Holds a CS degree. Workshop/talk history shows communication skills. Location is Lagos, Nigeria — may be remote-friendly but not stated.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB matching primary stack
Direct AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at current role
Strong TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship background plus CS degree
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Python experience listed
Heavy DLang focus across several roles, less depth shown in required secondary stack
Location in Lagos may complicate collaboration depending on remote policy

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the experience bar with deep full-stack TypeScript/Node/React work, has hands-on AI agent and MCP framework experience that maps directly to a key requirement, and demonstrates engineering rigor through TDD and workshop teaching. Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are minor given the breadth of language fluency and learning track record.
